text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As an eldest daughter, Ines Fujin feels a lot of
responsibility for her family. Even while training
for the races she loves so much, she works
part-time jobs to support her little sisters' dreams
as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling guilty for indulging in her desire to race,
she works hard for her family, and to fund her
sisters' dance lessons.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin tells me she wants to continue working
part-time jobs even after her debut in the Twinkle
Series. It seems she's determined to keep doing
her best both on the track and at work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The path ahead might get tough, but she doesn't
want to neglect any of the things that matter to
her. I swear that I'll do all I can to support her!
